diagnostic_explanation: Both reviewers kept the same supported label and used the same reason code and confidence. The only real difference is citation scope: option 1 cites both the budget-root-cause evidence and the stack-not-root-cause evidence, while option 2 cites only the stack-not-root-cause evidence. Given the claim 'do_not_blame_stack_for_budget_failure,' evidence 003 alone is sufficient to support the proposition, and evidence 002 is consistent but not necessary. Thus this is an equivalent evidence subset difference rather than a substantive disagreement. Option 1 is slightly more explicit about the budget/failure framing, but option 2 still adequately supports the frozen label from the supplied evidence.
